events.text: Darwin Núñez (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card.
Penalty saved! André Ayew (Ghana) fails to capitalise on this great opportunity,  left footed shot saved  in the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Ghana 0, Uruguay 1. Giorgian de Arrascaeta (Uruguay) header from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  Ghana 0, Uruguay 2. Giorgian de Arrascaeta (Uruguay) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Luis Suárez.
Luis Suárez (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card.
Kamaldeen Sulemana (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Sebastián Coates (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Alidu Seidu (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Edinson Cavani (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card.
José Giménez (Uruguay) is shown the yellow card.
